problem id: 619a99d2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  11111011 -> 11111111
  10101101 -> 01011111
  11100101 -> 11111011
  01110001 -> 11111010
  01110110 -> 11111111
  10111011 -> 01111111
  00100000 -> 01010000
  11011001 -> 11111111
  00000110 -> 00001111

query: 01101000
predicted answer: 11110100
